step.1.helper: Just your first name keeps things casual.

step.10.helper: Don't be shy — even small ones count. Select all that apply.

step.11.opt.escape.label: I want to escape my current environment and experience something new

step.11.opt.mix.label: A mix of all of the above honestly
step.11.opt.people.label: I want to meet people from all over the world and grow as a person
step.11.opt.research.label: I want access to research, labs, and opportunities I can't get elsewhere

step.12.opt.unsure.label: I have no idea yet — show me everything

step.13.opt.balanced.label: Someone living a balanced, meaningful life — work and beyond
step.13.opt.creative.label: A creative who makes things that move people
step.13.opt.founder.label: A founder or entrepreneur building something of my own
step.13.opt.impact.label: I want to make a real difference in my community or the world
step.13.opt.leader.label: A leader who shapes teams, orgs, or policy
step.13.opt.researcher.label: A researcher pushing the boundaries of what we know
step.13.opt.specialist.label: A specialist who is world-class at one thing
step.13.opt.unsure.label: Honestly, I just want to figure it out step by step
step.13.title: Fast forward 10 years — which version of yourself excites you most?
step.14.affirmation: Thanks for being open — we prioritize scholarship matches for you.
step.14.opt.critical.label: Critical — I need a full scholarship or I can't go
step.14.opt.helpful.label: Helpful — partial support would make a big difference
step.14.opt.nice.label: Nice to have — I have some resources but would welcome help
step.14.opt.none.label: Not a concern — finances aren't a barrier for me
step.14.opt.very.label: Very important — I need significant aid to make it work

step.15.opt.anywhere.label: Anywhere in the world — the further the adventure, the better
step.15.opt.closeish.label: Close-ish to home — I want to visit family sometimes
step.15.opt.near_city.label: I'd prefer to stay in or near my city
step.15.opt.own_country_far.label: Within my own country but far from home
step.15.opt.region.label: Another country, but preferably a specific region
step.15.title: How far are you open to going?
step.16.opt.big_city.label: Big city campus — cafes, culture, and chaos
step.16.opt.campus_town.label: A dedicated campus town where university IS the town
step.16.opt.mixed.label: Mixed — urban but with a proper campus feel
step.16.opt.no_pref.label: Doesn't matter much to me
step.16.opt.quiet.label: Quiet, green, and residential — I need space to think
step.16.title: What kind of environment sounds like you?
step.17.opt.large.label: Large (20,000+ students) — more resources, more people
step.17.opt.medium.label: Medium (5,000–20,000) — good balance of both worlds
step.17.opt.no_pref.label: No preference — show me what matches my profile
step.17.opt.small.label: Small (under 5,000) — tight community, closer with professors
step.17.title: How big do you want your university to be?
step.18.opt.aid.label: Scholarship and financial aid availability

step.18.opt.class_size.label: Class sizes and access to professors
step.18.opt.diversity.label: Diversity and international community
step.18.opt.location.label: Location and city life

step.18.opt.research.label: Research opportunities and labs

step.18.opt.student_life.label: Student life, clubs, and campus culture

step.19.opt.no_pref.label: I don't have a strong preference yet
step.19.opt.project.label: Project-based and collaborative — I want to build things
step.19.opt.research.label: Research-focused — I want to dig deep and contribute new ideas

step.22.opt.confident.label: Honestly, I'm pretty confident — just want the right list

step.22.opt.overwhelming.label: The application process feels overwhelming — I don't know where to start
